creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
jkois       2010-07-21 21:32:12 UTC

  FreeBSD doc repository

  Modified files:
    share/sgml           mirrors.xml 
  Log:
  PR:     docs/148513
  
  Remove New Zealand from the list of "countries with FreeBSD mirrors".
  
  All the mirrors once located there (1x HTTP, 1 FTP, 2 CVSUP) have obviously been dead for a long time.
  
  Noticed by:     Sam Lin (semin2006 att gmail dott com)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.112     +0 -22     doc/share/sgml/mirrors.xml
